commands.repair_reason: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the PR is focused and has no actionable code defect.; Cleared: The patch changes one existing SwiftPM lockfile pin to a matching upstream release tag and does not add scripts, workflows, permissions, or new dependency sources. commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `apps/swabble/Package.resolved` to move the existing `github.com/apple/swift-testing` pin and origin hash from 6.3.1 to 6.3.2.

PR surface: Other 0. Total 0 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a dependency maintenance PR rather than a bug report. Source inspection confirmed the manifest permits the newer patch version and the PR only updates the existing lockfile pin.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the PR is focused and has no actionable code defect.

target.title: build(deps): bump github.com/apple/swift-testing from 6.3.1 to 6.3.2 in /apps/swabble in the swift-deps group across 1 directory
target.body:
Bumps the swift-deps group with 1 update in the /apps/swabble directory: [github.com/apple/swift-testing](https://github.com/apple/swift-testing). Updates `github.com/apple/swift-testing` from 6.3.1 to 6.3.2
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/apple/swift-testing's releases.

Swift 6.3.2 Release

What's Changed

  • [6.3.2] Fully-qualify reference to 'Comment' type in #expect expansion when comment argument isn't a string literal by @​stmontgomery in swiftlang/swift-testing#1652
  • [6.3.2] Diagnose the use of a generic clause on @Test, @Suite, and @Tag. by @​grynspan in swiftlang/swift-testing#1653
  • Bump the Swift version to 6.3.2 by @​shahmishal in swiftlang/swift-testing#1661
  • [6.3.2] Fix off-by-one error trimming barrier sequences from exit test output streams. by @​grynspan in swiftlang/swift-testing#1695

Full Changelog: https://github.com/swiftlang/swift-testing/compare/swift-6.3.1-RELEASE...swift-6.3.2-RELEASE
